76 A1600_ENTRY_DT A1600_ENTRY_DT A1600 Entry Date DATE 8 This column contains the date of entry (admission or reentry) into the facility.
77 A1700_ENTRY_TYPE_CD A1700_ENTRY_TYPE_CD A1700 Type of Entry Code CHAR 1 This data in this column identifies the type of entry - admission or reentry.
